speaker: speaker1
text: excuse me , could you tell me which line I ’ m supposed to stand in to buy bubble wrap and to post a package ?

speaker: speaker2
text: you can buy the bubble wrap here , but you ’ ll have to stand in line over here to post your passage .

speaker: speaker1
text: that ’ s a really long line . How long do you think it ’ ll take to get through all those people ?

speaker: speaker2
text: it takes about 3 minutes per person , so it ’ ll probably be about an hour ’ s wait .

speaker: speaker2
text: sure . How many would you like ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I need 30 for my Christmas cards .

speaker: speaker1
text: twenty of them are going abroad to China and America .

speaker: speaker2
text: do you have any going anywhere in the EU ? If you do , those are less expensive .

speaker: speaker2
text: ok , here you go . That will be 18 pounds and seventy two pence .

speaker: speaker1
text: thanks a lot . You ’ Ve been very helpful .
